message:
feat(config): add health monitoring configuration schema

Adds [health] config section for agent health monitoring with:
- enabled: Master toggle for health monitoring
- check_interval: Seconds between health checks (default: 10)
- stall_threshold: Seconds without output before stalled (default: 300)
- auto_restart: Enable auto-restart on unhealthy state (default: false)
- max_restarts: Max restart attempts (default: 3)
- restart_backoff_base: Initial restart delay in seconds (default: 30)
- restart_backoff_max: Maximum restart delay in seconds (default: 300)

Includes validation, GetValue support, Diff tracking, and Print output.
This supports the Agent Health & Resilience epic (ntm-6d5p).

Closes: ntm-bgad
